core_philosophy: High-speed clinical workflow tool prioritizing trust ('zero data retention') and precision. The aesthetic is clean, grounded, and medical, using organic stone and emerald tones to reduce clinical anxiety while maintaining strict data-density for the physician.

wizard_header.description: Sticky top bar showing numbered progress. Must use solid background (bg-white) with border-b to avoid text overlap.
wizard_header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white border-b border-stone-200 px-4 py-4 flex items-center justify-between

document_capture.classes: relative w-full aspect-[3/4] sm:aspect-video bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border-2 border-dashed border-stone-700 flex items-center justify-center
document_capture.bounding_box: absolute inset-8 border-2 border-emerald-500 rounded-xl pointer-events-none

dictation_panel.classes: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm
dictation_panel.script_slot: inline-block px-2 py-0.5 mx-1 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 text-amber-800 rounded font-mono text-sm empty:bg-stone-100 empty:border-dashed empty:border-stone-300 transition-colors

clinical_dashboard.description: High-density data grid for Step 3. Uses Mode B 'Control Room' Grid.
clinical_dashboard.data_card: col-span-1 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2
clinical_dashboard.action_button: w-full py-2 bg-stone-100 hover:bg-stone-200 text-stone-700 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors

result_panels.panel: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col h-full

trust_badge.description: HIPAA/Privacy messaging used throughout the app.
trust_badge.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-full border border-emerald-100

accessibility.contrast_requirements: All text must pass WCAG AA against stone-50 or white backgrounds.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, inputs, links, and wizard progression steps (e.g., data-testid='wizard-next-step').

auth_background.description: Calm, clean medical clinic interior for the login/auth split-screen background.

doctor_profile_placeholder.description: Modern doctor portrait for profile avatar placeholder if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts.
Use Tailwind exclusively for styling. Rely heavily on the stone-* and emerald-* palette.
Ensure the wizard feels fast and lightweight. Do not use heavy glassmorphism for clinical data.
Implement the 'trust_badge' prominently on the Auth screen and at the bottom of the Wizard.
For the Clinical Dashboard (Step 3), use high-density padding (p-3 or p-4) to fit all elements without scrolling unnecessarily.
